author: Maxim Khvatalin
message:
fix: keep night light calibration during transitions

Share a single NightLightCalibration value across the night light handler, light output, and transition transformer so Home Assistant light updates do not fall back to default attenuation values.

Apply off/night transitions immediately to avoid low-level color drift while preserving normal transitions from RGB and white modes.

author: Maxim Khvatalin
message:
feat: add YAML defaults for night light calibration

Expose fixed RGB attenuation defaults through the platform light schema and shared package substitutions, so users can configure stock-compatible night light color temperature calibration from YAML.

author: Maxim Khvatalin
message:
feat: add night light calibration controls

Expose Home Assistant template number controls for tuning night light color-temperature calibration.

The calibration package adds tint, temperature, and level sliders that are restored by ESPHome and applied immediately to the active light state.

The implementation keeps the default behavior configurable through YAML substitutions, clamps generated RGB attenuation values to the useful range, and includes an optional developer package for raw RGB calibration.

author: Maurice Makaay
message:
Fix light state not restored after power cycle

ESPHome 2023.4.0 changed the default restore_mode
from RESTORE_DEFAULT_OFF to ALWAYS_OFF. Override
the default so state is saved to flash and restored
on boot.

Also replace the obsolete MyLightStateRTCState
struct with ESPHome's LightStateRTCState. The old
struct had a different memory layout, causing
disco_stop() to read misaligned data.

author: Maurice Makaay
message:
Fix disco_off action

Wrap raw bool via cg.templatable() for TemplatableFn compatibility.
This makes the functionality compatible with esphome 2026.4.0.

author: Maurice Makaay
message: Update documentation for 2016.4.0 release

author: Maurice Makaay
message: Update CHANGELOG.md

author: Maurice Makaay
message:
Fix ESPHome 2026.4.0 compatibility

CallbackManager copy constructor was deleted in ESPHome 2026.4.0.
Pass CallbackManagers by pointer instead of by value in the light
transition transformer.

The TEMPLATABLE_VALUE macro now uses TemplatableFn which only accepts
function pointers. Wrap raw constants via cg.templatable() in the
front panel LED action codegen.

author: Maurice Makaay
message: Prepare for release

author: Maurice Makaay
message:
Fix register_action missing synchronous= parameter

Fixes compile-time warnings:

WARNING register_action('...', ...) is missing the synchronous=
parameter. Defaulting to synchronous=False (safe but prevents StringRef
optimization). Check the C++ class: use synchronous=False if
play_next_() is deferred to a callback, timer, or loop(); use
synchronous=True if play_next_() always runs before the initial
play/play_complex call returns

author: Zack Baldwin
message:
Fix ESPHome 2025.11 compatibility: Update Action::play() method signatures

- Update play() method signatures in automation classes to match ESPHome 2025.11 API
- Change from 'Ts... x' to 'const Ts &...x' parameter format
- Fixed in both light/automation.h and output/automation.h files
- Affects ActivatePresetAction, DiscoAction, SetLEDsAction, SetLevelAction, and UpdateLEDsAction classes
- Resolves compilation errors when building with ESPHome 2025.11+
